case_title: MATLIN & ASSOCIATES VS. SALIM NASSER et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-02-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NASSER, SAMEER DBA NASSER PROPERTIES
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $559.01 FILED BY MATLIN & ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT NASSER, SALIM DBA NASSER PROPERTIES NASSER, SAMEER DBA NASSER PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM HOLLI THIER FILED BY MATLIN & ASSOCIATES NASSER, SALIM DBA NASSER PROPERTIES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-02-2009 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF MATLIN & ASSOCIATES ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT NASSER, SALIM DBA NASSER PROPERTIES NASSER, SAMEER DBA NASSER PROPERTIES
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-02-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-02-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: HOLLI THIER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MATLIN & ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NASSER, SALIM DBA NASSER PROPERTIES NASSER, SAMEER DBA NASSER PROPERTIES $340.26 PRINCIPAL, $11.42 INTEREST, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $481.68, PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED S VALID FEE AGREEMENT IN WRITING. DEFENDANTS NOTED MANY CHARGES THEY DID NOT BELIEVE THEY SHOULD HAVE PAID. THE COURT SUBTRACTED FROM THE TOTAL AMOUNT DUE OF $559.01, $175.00 FOR THE TERMINATION LETTER, AS WELL AS $43.75 FOR THE FINAL DEMAND LETTER, SINCE THE ATTORNEY-CLIENT RELATIONSHIP HAD TERMINATED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
